Vine-Binding.name: Vine-Binding
Vine-Binding.description: A skellach fetish-discipline that binds and immobilizes captives through living plant-matter. Vines answer to the practitioner's hands and coil into unbreakable restraints within seconds. The binding cannot be broken without a blade or another skellach's deliberate release; combat use lays a captive flat and ends an engagement; ritual use prepares a passer for the slow methodical work that follows.
